criteria_verification.criterion_text: `AgentManifest` validates `confidence` in `[0.0, 1.0]` — values outside rejected with `ValidationError`
criteria_verification.evidence: IntentCapability.confidence field has ge=0.0, le=1.0 constraints. Existing tests in TestIntentCapabilityConfidence verify boundary values (0.0, 1.0) and reject -0.1 and 1.1. Tests pass.
criteria_verification.notes: IntentCapability.confidence field has ge=0.0, le=1.0 constraints. Existing tests in TestIntentCapabilityConfidence verify boundary values (0.0, 1.0) and reject -0.1 and 1.1. Tests pass.

criteria_verification.evidence: AgentManifest.max_concurrent field has ge=1 constraint. Existing test test_agent_manifest_max_concurrent_must_be_ge_1 in test_fleet_events.py verifies max_concurrent=0 is rejected. Tests pass.
criteria_verification.notes: AgentManifest.max_concurrent field has ge=1 constraint. Existing test test_agent_manifest_max_concurrent_must_be_ge_1 in test_fleet_events.py verifies max_concurrent=0 is rejected. Tests pass.

criteria_verification.evidence: agent_id, name, and template have no default values in AgentManifest, making them required. Existing tests verify minimal instantiation requires all three fields. Tests pass.
criteria_verification.notes: agent_id, name, and template have no default values in AgentManifest, making them required. Existing tests verify minimal instantiation requires all three fields. Tests pass.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `AgentManifest` requires at least zero intents (empty list is valid at model level; empty-list rejection is a registry concern)
criteria_verification.evidence: intents field uses default_factory=list, so empty list is the default. Existing test test_defaults_applied verifies m.intents == []. Tests pass.
criteria_verification.notes: intents field uses default_factory=list, so empty list is the default. Existing test test_defaults_applied verifies m.intents == []. Tests pass.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `metadata` validator rejects payloads > 64KB with descriptive error
criteria_verification.evidence: Added @field_validator('metadata') method metadata_size_must_not_exceed_64kb to AgentManifest that uses json.dumps(v).encode() for byte-accurate size check and raises ValueError with message 'metadata exceeds the maximum allowed size of 64KB'. Added 7 new tests in TestMetadataValidator class covering: small metadata, empty metadata, just under 64KB, over 64KB (rejected), exactly at boundary (accepted), one byte over (rejected), descriptive error message. All 7 tests pass.
criteria_verification.notes: Added @field_validator('metadata') method metadata_size_must_not_exceed_64kb to AgentManifest that uses json.dumps(v).encode() for byte-accurate size check and raises ValueError with message 'metadata exceeds the maximum allowed size of 64KB'. All 7 tests pass.
